items.title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
items.dek: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.
items.body: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Man inherits 500 lawnmowers – and is now ‘spoiled for choice’ when cutting grass
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Indian migrant workers hit by cooking gas shortages are leaving cities
items.dek: Migrant workers say they are struggling to access cooking gas cylinders as the Iran war squeezes supplies.
items.body: Migrant workers say they are struggling to access cooking gas cylinders as the Iran war squeezes supplies.
items.author: IriLine Desk
